ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., precipitation, runoff, surface water) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "watershed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watershed where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations_watersheds" (
  "watershed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watershed */,
  "watershed_name" TEXT /* Name of the watershed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watershed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watershed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precipitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the precipitation data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the precipitation measurement */,
  "precipitation_amount" REAL /* Amount of precipitation measured */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flag (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precipitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runoff_data" (
  "runoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runoff record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the runoff data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the runoff measurement */,
  "runoff_amount" REAL /* Amount of runoff measured */,
  "runoff_type" TEXT /* Type of runoff (e.g., surface, subsurface) */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flag (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runoff_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surface_water_data" (
  "surface_water_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surface water record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the surface water data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the surface water measurement */,
  "surface_water_amount" REAL /* Amount of surface water measured */,
  "surface_water_type" TEXT /* Type of surface water (e.g., lake, river) */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flag (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surface_water_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surface_water_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groundwater_data" (
  "groundwater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each groundwater record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the groundwater data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the groundwater measurement */,
  "groundwater_amount" REAL /* Amount of groundwater measured */,
  "groundwater_type" TEXT /* Type of groundwater (e.g., confined, unconfined) */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flag (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("groundwater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groundwater_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_diversion_data" (
  "water_diversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water diversion record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the water diversion data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the water diversion measurement */,
  "water_diversion_amount" REAL /* Amount of water diverted */,
  "water_diversion_type" TEXT /* Type of water diversion (e.g., irrigation, municipal) */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flag (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_diversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_diversion_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_return_data" (
  "water_return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water return record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the water return data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the water return measurement */,
  "water_return_amount" REAL /* Amount of water returned */,
  "water_return_type" TEXT /* Type of water return (e.g., surface, subsurface) */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flag (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_return_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recharge_data" (
  "recharge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recharge record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the recharge data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recharge measurement */,
  "recharge_amount" REAL /* Amount of recharge */,
  "recharge_type" TEXT /* Type of recharge (e.g., surface, subsurface) */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flag (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recharge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recharge_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "et_data" (
  "et_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ET record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the ET data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the ET measurement */,
  "et_amount" REAL /* Amount of ET */,
  "et_type" TEXT /* Type of ET (e.g., actual, potential) */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flag (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("et_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_et_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_change_data" (
  "storage_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage change record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the storage change data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the storage change measurement */,
  "storage_change_amount" REAL /* Amount of storage change */,
  "storage_change_type" TEXT /* Type of storage change (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control flag (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_change_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, government agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "data_quality_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality flag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being flagged */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being flagged (e.g., precipitation, runoff) */,
  "flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., good, suspect) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reason for the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
